mapper.select:
select ol.outid, ol.orderid, ol.count, DATE_FORMAT(ol.time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as date, ui.name from out_library ol inner join user_info ui on ui.userid = ol.userid
ol.userid = #{userid}
and outid like concat('%',#{outid},'%')
and orderid like concat('%',#{orderid},'%')
and ol.time BETWEEN CONCAT(#{date}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{date}, ' 23:59:59')
and count = #{count}
and ui.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
